query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS department_revenue_ledger (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department_id INT NOT NULL,
  house_id INT,
  ledger_type ENUM('laws_central', 'house_licensed') NOT NULL,
  period_start BIGINT NOT NULL,
  period_end BIGINT NOT NULL,
  gross_revenue DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  laws_share DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  house_share DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  trust_share DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  licensing_fees_collected DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_utilization_hours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_invoices INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_clients_served INT DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('open', 'closed', 'reconciled') DEFAULT 'open',
  reconciled_by INT,
  reconciled_at BIGINT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department_id INT NOT NULL,
  house_id INT,
  ledger_type ENUM('laws_central', 'house_licensed') NOT NULL,
  period_start BIGINT NOT NULL,

  laws_share DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  house_share DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  trust_share DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  licensing_fees_collected DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_utilization_hours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_invoices INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_clients_served INT DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('open', 'closed', 'reconciled') DEFAULT 'open',
  reconciled_by INT,
  reconciled_at BIGINT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
